selected_direction: Macro screen-surface ImageGen raster overlay stack: large touchable foreground droplets and rivulets visibly sliding down the viewer-facing glass.
rationale: User tightened the previous photoreal overlay because the drops were too small, too slow, and blended into bridge depth. This successor keeps the flipped K3 proof systems intact and replaces the single slow overlay with a three-layer ImageGen-derived macro screen-surface raster stack.

deterministic_transform.reason: move bridge tower out from under fixed right rail for review

layers.source_safety: raster overlay composited over source plate; no people, vehicle, bridge, or source-plate geometry animation
raster overlay stack composited over source plate; no people, vehicle, bridge, or source-plate geometry animation

supersedes.reason: user requested increased droplet opacity while preserving weather-app bead direction
